reasoning: Mecoprop is 2-(4-chloro-2-methylphenoxy)propionic acid, a chlorinated phenoxy propionic acid herbicide. It contains a chlorine-substituted phenoxy group attached to a propionic acid, making it an organochloride and specifically a phenoxyacetic acid derivative (phenoxypropanoic acid class falls under phenoxyacetic acid derivatives in ChemOnt).
